import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/pages/home/index.vue");
import { mapGetters, mapMutations, mapActions } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/vuex.js?v=449135bb";
import SecondaryNav from "/src/components/home/secondaryNav/secondaryNav.vue";
import Donghua from "/src/components/home/donghua/donghua.vue";
import Popularize from "/src/components/popularize/popularize.vue";
import { formatDuration } from "/src/utils/formatDuration.js";
import http from "/src/utils/http.js";

// 前端轮询让首页数据保持实时，每30秒刷新一次
let _refreshTimer = null;

const _sfc_main = {
  components: {
    SecondaryNav,
    Donghua,
    Popularize
  },
  created() {
    this.loadHomeData();
    // 轮询刷新视频列表
    _refreshTimer = setInterval(() => this.loadHomeData(), 30000);
  },
  beforeUnmount() {
    if (_refreshTimer) clearInterval(_refreshTimer);
  },
  watch: {
    scrollTop() {
      this.checkEleOffsetTop();
      this.loading = false;
    }
  },
  computed: {
    ...mapGetters([
      "scrollTop",
      "slide",
      "recommend",
      "popularize",
      "online",
      "donghua",
      "module"
    ]),
    menuLeft() {
      return this.$store.state.header.menuLeft;
    },
    menuRight() {
      return this.$store.state.header.menuRight;
    },
    donghuaModules() {
      return this.module || [];
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      loading: false,
      apiVideos: [],
      carouselIdx: 0,
      carouselTimer: null,
    };
  },
  methods: {
    ...mapMutations({
      setEleOffsetTop: "SET_ELE_OFFSETTOP"
    }),
    ...mapActions([
      "setAdSlide",
      "setSlide",
      "setRankingIndex",
      "setOnline",
      "setDynamicRegion",
      "setNewlist",
      "setRankingRegion",
      "setTimeline"
    ]),

    formatDuration,

    // 数字格式化：过万显示为 x.x万
    formatCount(num) {
      if (!num && num !== 0) return '0';
      if (num >= 10000) {
        return (num / 10000).toFixed(1) + '万';
      }
      return String(num);
    },

    // 时间友好格式
    formatTimeAgo(dateStr) {
      if (!dateStr) return '';
      try {
        const d = new Date(dateStr.replace(/-/g, '/'));
        if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return dateStr.slice(0, 10);
        const now = new Date();
        const diff = Math.floor((now - d) / 1000);
        if (diff < 60) return '刚刚';
        if (diff < 3600) return Math.floor(diff / 60) + '分钟前';
        if (diff < 86400) return Math.floor(diff / 3600) + '小时前';
        if (diff < 2592000) return Math.floor(diff / 86400) + '天前';
        return dateStr.slice(0, 10);
      } catch {
        return dateStr ? dateStr.slice(0, 10) : '';
      }
    },

    // 回到顶部
    scrollToTop() {
      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    },

    // 反馈
    handleFeedback() {
      // 可以跳转到反馈页或弹出提示
      window.open('https://github.com/earthcake2233/cakecake/issues', '_blank');
    },

    async loadHomeData() {
      try {
        // 优先取轮播（前12个，按时间倒序），不够时兜底取默认列表
        let items = [];
        try {
          const res = await http.get("/api/v1/videos", {
            params: { limit: 12, sort: "time" }
          });
          if (res && res.data && Array.isArray(res.data.items)) {
            items = res.data.items;
          }
        } catch (_e) {
          console.warn("[index.vue] /videos?sort=time 失败，回退默认列表");
        }
        if (!items.length) {
          try {
            const res2 = await http.get("/api/v1/videos", {
              params: { limit: 12 }
            });
            if (res2 && res2.data && Array.isArray(res2.data.items)) {
              items = res2.data.items;
            }
          } catch (_e2) {
            console.warn("[index.vue] /videos 默认列表也失败");
          }
        }
        this.apiVideos = items;
        // 同步到 vuex 供其他组件使用
        if (items.length > 0) {
          this.setSlide(items.slice(0, 10));
          this.setRankingIndex(3);
        }
        try { await this.setOnline(); } catch (_) {}
        // 分区数据：动画 / 音乐 / 舞蹈
        try { await this.setDynamicRegion({ id: 0, ps: 15, rid: 1 }); } catch (_) {}
        try { await this.setDynamicRegion({ id: 3, ps: 15, rid: 3 }); } catch (_) {}
        try { await this.setDynamicRegion({ id: 4, ps: 15, rid: 129 }); } catch (_) {}
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('加载首页视频失败:', e);
      }
    },

    // 前5个作为轮播
    get featuredVideos() {
      const arr = Array.isArray(this.apiVideos) ? this.apiVideos : [];
      return arr.slice(0, Math.min(5, arr.length));
    },
    // 全部12个作为下方网格（3列 × 4行）
    get gridVideos() {
      return Array.isArray(this.apiVideos) ? this.apiVideos : [];
    },

    // 轮播控制
    carouselNext() {
      const n = this.featuredVideos.length;
      if (n === 0) return;
      this.carouselIdx = (this.carouselIdx + 1) % n;
      this.resetCarouselTimer();
    },
    carouselPrev() {
      const n = this.featuredVideos.length;
      if (n === 0) return;
      this.carouselIdx = (this.carouselIdx - 1 + n) % n;
      this.resetCarouselTimer();
    },
    resetCarouselTimer() {
      if (this.carouselTimer) clearInterval(this.carouselTimer);
      this.carouselTimer = setInterval(() => {
        const n = this.featuredVideos.length;
        if (n > 0) this.carouselIdx = (this.carouselIdx + 1) % n;
      }, 4000);
    },

    // 视频链接（带跟踪参数）
    videoLink(id, from, pos) {
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      params.set('from', from);
      params.set('pos', String(pos || 0));
      // 匿名访问者ID
      let vid = localStorage.getItem('bilibili_visitor_id');
      if (!vid) {
        vid = 'vs_' + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15) + Date.now().toString(36);
        localStorage.setItem('bilibili_visitor_id', vid);
      }
      params.set('vid', vid);
      return `/video/${id}?${params.toString()}`;
    },

    checkEleOffsetTop() {
      // 和各分区模块对齐 offsetTop
    },

    setData() {
      // 兼容旧方法，实际数据通过 loadHomeData 获取
    }
  }
};

import { createCommentVNode as _createCommentVNode, createElementVNode as _createElementVNode, openBlock as _openBlock, createElementBlock as _createElementBlock, resolveComponent as _resolveComponent, createVNode as _createVNode, renderList as _renderList, Fragment as _Fragment, toDisplayString as _toDisplayString, withCtx as _withCtx, vShow as _vShow, withDirectives as _withDirectives, withModifiers as _withModifiers, normalizeClass as _normalizeClass, createBlock as _createBlock } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/vue.js?v=4c11686d"

const _hoisted_1 = { class: "floating-sidebar" }
const _hoisted_2 = { class: "app-body bili-wrapper home-bili-sim" }
const _hoisted_3 = {
  id: "chief_recommend",
  class: "chief-recommend-module"
}
const _hoisted_4 = {
  key: 0,
  class: "carousel-section"
}
const _hoisted_5 = { class: "carousel-fullwidth" }
const _hoisted_6 = ["src", "alt"]
const _hoisted_7 = { class: "carousel-overlay" }
const _hoisted_8 = { class: "carousel-info" }
const _hoisted_9 = { class: "carousel-title" }
const _hoisted_10 = { class: "carousel-meta" }
const _hoisted_11 = { class: "carousel-dots" }
const _hoisted_12 = ["onClick"]
const _hoisted_13 = {
  key: 1,
  class: "video-grid-section"
}
const _hoisted_14 = { class: "video-grid" }
const _hoisted_15 = { class: "video-card-cover" }
const _hoisted_16 = ["src", "alt"]
const _hoisted_17 = { class: "cover-duration" }
const _hoisted_18 = { class: "cover-play-count" }
const _hoisted_19 = { class: "cover-danmaku-count" }
const _hoisted_20 = { class: "video-card-info" }
const _hoisted_21 = { class: "video-card-title" }
const _hoisted_22 = { class: "video-card-meta" }
const _hoisted_23 = { class: "meta-uploader" }
const _hoisted_24 = { class: "meta-time" }
const _hoisted_25 = {
  key: 0,
  class: "video-card-tags"
}
const _hoisted_26 = { class: "card-tag" }
const _hoisted_27 = {
  key: 2,
  class: "loading-wrapper"
}
const _hoisted_28 = { class: "bili-wrapper primary-menu-wrapper" }
const _hoisted_29 = { class: "primary-menu" }
const _hoisted_30 = { class: "nav-menu" }
const _hoisted_31 = ["href"]
const _hoisted_32 = {
  key: 0,
  class: "num-wrap"
}
const _hoisted_33 = { class: "nav-name" }
const _hoisted_34 = {
  key: 0,
  class: "sub-nav"
}
const _hoisted_35 = ["href"]

function _sfc_render(_ctx, _cache, $props, $setup, $data, $options) {
  const _component_secondary_nav = _resolveComponent("secondary-nav")
  const _component_router_link = _resolveComponent("router-link")
  const _component_popularize = _resolveComponent("popularize")
  const _component_donghua = _resolveComponent("donghua")

  return (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, [
    _createCommentVNode(" 右侧悬浮快捷按钮 "),
    _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_1, [
      _createElementVNode("button", {
        class: "floating-btn",
        title: "回到顶部",
        onClick: _cache[0] || (_cache[0] = (...args) => ($options.scrollToTop && $options.scrollToTop(...args)))
      }, [...(_cache[4] || (_cache[4] = [
        _createElementVNode("svg", {
          viewBox: "0 0 24 24",
          fill: "none",
          stroke: "currentColor",
          "stroke-width": "2"
        }, [
          _createElementVNode("path", { d: "M18 15l-6-6-6 6" })
        ], -1 /* CACHED */)
      ]))]),
      _createElementVNode("button", {
        class: "floating-btn",
        title: "反馈",
        onClick: _cache[1] || (_cache[1] = (...args) => ($options.handleFeedback && $options.handleFeedback(...args)))
      }, [...(_cache[5] || (_cache[5] = [
        _createElementVNode("svg", {
          viewBox: "0 0 24 24",
          fill: "none",
          stroke: "currentColor",
          "stroke-width": "2"
        }, [
          _createElementVNode("path", { d: "M21 15a2 2 0 01-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2z" })
        ], -1 /* CACHED */)
      ]))])
    ]),
    _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_2, [
      _createCommentVNode(" 二级导航栏 "),
      _createVNode(_component_secondary_nav),
      _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_3, [
        _createCommentVNode(" 宽幅轮播 "),
        ($options.featuredVideos.length > 0)
          ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_4, [
              _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_5, [
                (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList($options.featuredVideos, (v, i) => {
                  return _withDirectives((_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", {
                    key: 'car-'+v.id,
                    class: "carousel-slide"
                  }, [
                    _createVNode(_component_router_link, {
                      to: $options.videoLink(v.id, 'homepage_carousel', i)
                    }, {
                      default: _withCtx(() => [
                        _createElementVNode("img", {
                          src: v.cover_url,
                          alt: v.title,
                          class: "carousel-img"
                        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, _hoisted_6),
                        _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_7, [
                          _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_8, [
                            _createElementVNode("h2", _hoisted_9, _toDisplayString(v.title), 1 /* TEXT */),
                            _createElementVNode("p", _hoisted_10, [
                              _createElementVNode("span", null, _toDisplayString($options.formatCount(v.play_count)) + "播放", 1 /* TEXT */),
                              _cache[6] || (_cache[6] = _createElementVNode("span", { class: "dot-sep" }, "·", -1 /* CACHED */)),
                              _createElementVNode("span", null, _toDisplayString($options.formatCount(v.danmaku_count)) + "弹幕", 1 /* TEXT */)
                            ])
                          ])
                        ])
                      ]),
                      _: 2 /* DYNAMIC */
                    }, 1032 /* PROPS, DYNAMIC_SLOTS */, ["to"])
                  ])), [
                    [_vShow, $data.carouselIdx === i]
                  ])
                }), 128 /* KEYED_FRAGMENT */)),
                _createCommentVNode(" 左右箭头 "),
                _createElementVNode("button", {
                  class: "carousel-arrow carousel-arrow-left",
                  onClick: _cache[2] || (_cache[2] = _withModifiers((...args) => ($options.carouselPrev && $options.carouselPrev(...args)), ["stop"]))
                }, [...(_cache[7] || (_cache[7] = [
                  _createElementVNode("svg", {
                    viewBox: "0 0 24 24",
                    fill: "none",
                    stroke: "currentColor",
                    "stroke-width": "2"
                  }, [
                    _createElementVNode("path", { d: "M15 18l-6-6 6-6" })
                  ], -1 /* CACHED */)
                ]))]),
                _createElementVNode("button", {
                  class: "carousel-arrow carousel-arrow-right",
                  onClick: _cache[3] || (_cache[3] = _withModifiers((...args) => ($options.carouselNext && $options.carouselNext(...args)), ["stop"]))
                }, [...(_cache[8] || (_cache[8] = [
                  _createElementVNode("svg", {
                    viewBox: "0 0 24 24",
                    fill: "none",
                    stroke: "currentColor",
                    "stroke-width": "2"
                  }, [
                    _createElementVNode("path", { d: "M9 18l6-6-6-6" })
                  ], -1 /* CACHED */)
                ]))]),
                _createCommentVNode(" 圆点指示器 "),
                _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_11, [
                  (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList($options.featuredVideos, (v, i) => {
                    return (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("button", {
                      key: 'dot-'+v.id,
                      class: _normalizeClass(['carousel-dot', { active: $data.carouselIdx === i }]),
                      onClick: $event => ($data.carouselIdx = i)
                    }, null, 10 /* CLASS, PROPS */, _hoisted_12))
                  }), 128 /* KEYED_FRAGMENT */))
                ])
              ])
            ]))
          : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
        _createCommentVNode(" 视频卡片网格：3列 "),
        ($options.gridVideos.length > 0)
          ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_13, [
              _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_14, [
                (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList($options.gridVideos, (v, i) => {
                  return (_openBlock(), _createBlock(_component_router_link, {
                    key: 'grid-'+v.id,
                    to: $options.videoLink(v.id, 'homepage_grid', i),
                    class: "video-card"
                  }, {
                    default: _withCtx(() => [
                      _createCommentVNode(" 封面层 "),
                      _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_15, [
                        _createElementVNode("img", {
                          src: v.cover_url,
                          alt: v.title,
                          loading: "lazy"
                        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, _hoisted_16),
                        _createElementVNode("span", _hoisted_17, _toDisplayString($options.formatDuration(v.duration)), 1 /* TEXT */),
                        _createElementVNode("span", _hoisted_18, _toDisplayString($options.formatCount(v.play_count)) + "播放", 1 /* TEXT */),
                        _createElementVNode("span", _hoisted_19, _toDisplayString(v.danmaku_count) + "弹幕", 1 /* TEXT */)
                      ]),
                      _createCommentVNode(" 文字信息层 "),
                      _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_20, [
                        _createElementVNode("h3", _hoisted_21, _toDisplayString(v.title), 1 /* TEXT */),
                        _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_22, [
                          _createElementVNode("span", _hoisted_23, _toDisplayString(v.uploader || 'UP主'), 1 /* TEXT */),
                          _cache[9] || (_cache[9] = _createElementVNode("span", { class: "dot-sep" }, "·", -1 /* CACHED */)),
                          _createElementVNode("span", _hoisted_24, _toDisplayString($options.formatTimeAgo(v.created_at)), 1 /* TEXT */)
                        ]),
                        (v.category)
                          ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_25, [
                              _createElementVNode("span", _hoisted_26, _toDisplayString(v.category), 1 /* TEXT */)
                            ]))
                          : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true)
                      ])
                    ]),
                    _: 2 /* DYNAMIC */
                  }, 1032 /* PROPS, DYNAMIC_SLOTS */, ["to"]))
                }), 128 /* KEYED_FRAGMENT */))
              ])
            ]))
          : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
        _createCommentVNode(" 加载状态 "),
        ($data.loading)
          ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_27, [...(_cache[10] || (_cache[10] = [
              _createElementVNode("div", { class: "loading-spinner" }, null, -1 /* CACHED */),
              _createElementVNode("p", null, "加载中...", -1 /* CACHED */)
            ]))]))
          : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true)
      ]),
      _createCommentVNode(" 推广/在线 "),
      _createVNode(_component_popularize, {
        popularize: _ctx.popularize,
        online: _ctx.online
      }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["popularize", "online"]),
      _createCommentVNode(" 分区模块：动画 / 音乐 / 舞蹈 "),
      (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList($options.donghuaModules, (item) => {
        return (_openBlock(), _createBlock(_component_donghua, {
          key: item.ref,
          ref_for: true,
          ref: item.ref,
          id: item.ref,
          donghua: item,
          onSetDynamicRegion: _ctx.setDynamicRegion,
          onSetNewlist: _ctx.setNewlist,
          onSetRankingRegion: _ctx.setRankingRegion
        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["id", "donghua", "onSetDynamicRegion", "onSetNewlist", "onSetRankingRegion"]))
      }), 128 /* KEYED_FRAGMENT */)),
      _createCommentVNode(" 底部分类导航 "),
      _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_28, [
        _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_29, [
          _createElementVNode("ul", _hoisted_30, [
            (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList($options.menuLeft, (item, index) => {
              return (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("li", {
                key: 'menuLeft_item_'+index,
                class: _normalizeClass(item.class)
              }, [
                _createElementVNode("a", {
                  href: item.href
                }, [
                  (item.num)
                    ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_32, [
                        _createElementVNode("span", null, _toDisplayString(item.num < 1000 ? item.num : 999+'+'), 1 /* TEXT */)
                      ]))
                    : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
                  _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_33, _toDisplayString(item.name), 1 /* TEXT */)
                ], 8 /* PROPS */, _hoisted_31),
                (item.items)
                  ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("ul", _hoisted_34, [
                      (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList(item.items, (navitem, ind) => {
                        return (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("li", {
                          key: 'sub_navs_item_'+ind
                        }, [
                          _createElementVNode("a", {
                            href: navitem.href
                          }, [
                            _createElementVNode("span", null, _toDisplayString(navitem.name), 1 /* TEXT */)
                          ], 8 /* PROPS */, _hoisted_35)
                        ]))
                      }), 128 /* KEYED_FRAGMENT */))
                    ]))
                  : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true)
              ], 2 /* CLASS */))
            }), 128 /* KEYED_FRAGMENT */))
          ])
        ])
      ])
    ])
  ], 64 /* STABLE_FRAGMENT */))
}

import "/src/pages/home/index.vue?vue&type=style&index=0&scoped=2c5296db&lang.scss"

_sfc_main.__hmrId = "2c5296db"
typeof __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__ !== 'undefined' && __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.createRecord(_sfc_main.__hmrId, _sfc_main)
import.meta.hot.on('file-changed', ({ file }) => {
  __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.CHANGED_FILE = file
})
import.meta.hot.accept(mod => {
  if (!mod) return
  const { default: updated, _rerender_only } = mod
  if (_rerender_only) {
    __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.rerender(updated.__hmrId, updated.render)
  } else {
    __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.reload(updated.__hmrId, updated)
  }
})
import _export_sfc from "/@id/__x00__plugin-vue:export-helper"
export default /*#__PURE__*/_export_sfc(_sfc_main, [['render',_sfc_render],['__scopeId',"data-v-2c5296db"],['__file',"C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/cakecake-project/cakecake-vue/bilibili-vue/src/pages/home/index.vue"]])
//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
